description: Style Note puma gives you shoes that will make you want to go on a run with these stylish shoes. Designed for maximum comfort and easy using, these pair of shoes raises your style quotient while out for your regular run. Look good and feel even better with these trendy running shoes. Product Details Round blunt black slip on shoes with purple detailing Mesh and fabric upper with black, striped overlay Fabric interiors with padding at the mouth and a cushioned footbed Foaming rubber midsole TPU outsole with patterned flex grooves  Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight or machine wash
